phrases.en: I dip a sponge into soapy water.
phrases.zh: 我把海绵浸入肥皂水里。

phrases.en: And wash the car with it.
To rinse the car, I spray it with water.
phrases.zh: 为了冲洗汽车，我用水喷它。

phrases.en: I dry it with some rags.
Then, I spread some wax on the car.
phrases.zh: 然后，我在车上涂一些蜡。

phrases.en: After it has dried, I wipe the wax off.
phrases.zh: 等蜡干了以后，我把蜡擦掉。

phrases.en: And buff the car with a soft cloth.
Finally, I wash the windows outside.
